services.name: MT/ Mobile terminated Premium
services.description: MTrnMT (Mobile terminated): means a message that goes out from a system and is received by the subscriber's mobile device and the receiver will be charged. rnIn this business model the partner should be subscribe two short codes; one for auto replay and one for subscription. rn Legal requirement to get MT rn1) Request letter rn2) Renewed or new trade license and commercial registration. rn3) Renewed or new VAS (Value Added Service) license given by ECA(Ethiopia communication autority) located on bole medahniyalem, robel plaza. rn4) TIN number rn5) VAT certificate rn6) House rent or proof of ownership rn7) Availing Article and memorandum of association for a share company rn8) Letter of agreement from certified professionals or patent right (if needed) rn9) Minimum capital amount required for VAS business partnership is ETB 100,000

services.name: SMS Premium
services.description: SMS Premium rnSMS Premium service: - means a revenue sharing model where VASP(Value added ervice provider) in collaboration with ethio telecom provides/receives various information’s and messages with its customers. rn Legal requirement to get SMS Premium rn1) Trade registration rn2) Trade license rn3) TIN and VAT certificate rn4) House rent agreement rn5) Renewed or new VAS (Value Added Service) license given by ECA(Ethiopia communication autority) located on bole medahniyalem, robel plaza rn6) Request letter rn7) Well-developed business proposal rn8) Layer 3 VPN minimum 1mbps rn9) Agreement document will be signed rn10) Software and database are required from customer side rn11) You can set usage fee from 1 birr up-to 15 birr per SMS.

services.name: SMS Non-Premium
services.description: SMS Non-Premium rnNon-premium value added service: - means a non- revenue sharing mode VAS with default/normal tariff, where VASP(Value added ervice provider) in collaboration with ethio telecom provides/receives various information’s and messages with its customers in order to enhance the efficiency of its service. rn Legal requirement to get SMS Non-Premium rn1) Trade registration rn2) Trade license rn3) TIN and VAT certificate rn4) House rent agreement rn5) Request letter rn6) Well-developed business proposal

services.name: Voice Premium
services.description: Voice premium rnVoice premium: is a premium service in which the partner will gain revenue from the call. rn Legal requirement to get Voice Premium rn1) Trade registration rn2) Trade license rn3) TIN and VAT certificate rn4) House rent agreement rn5) Renewed or new VAS (Value Added Service) license given by ECA(Ethiopia communication autority) located on bole medahniyalem, robel plaza rn6) Request letter rn7) Well-developed business proposal

services.name: Collocation
services.description: Collocation rnColocation service: is a kind of hosting service that enables the partner to host its infrastructure in a well secured datacenters equipped with commercial power, generator backup power, and full UPS protected & filtered power with enterprise grade networking, cooling and fire suppression system facilities.rnrnLegal Requirements to get Collocation rnrn1) Request letter rnrnrnrn2) Renewed or new trade license and commercial registration.rnrnrnrn3) TIN number- rnrnrnrn4) VAT certificaternrnrnrnrn5) House rent or proof of ownershiprnrnrnrnrn6) Agreementrnrnrnrn7) To fill Power distribution unit form (from Ethio)rnrnrnrn8) Bring Router and/or Rack specification

services.name: M2M (Machine to Machine)
services.description: M2M SIM (MACHIN TO MACHIN SIM) rnM2M SIM: mainly used as a communication media between Machines to exchange data via SMS or Data & internet connectivity. M2M business solutions is a postpaid form so that your business will not experience service inter interruption whenever you run out of business Flexible to upgrade or downgrade your preferred M2M bundle(s) rnLegal Requirements to get M2M rn1) Request letter rn2) Renewed or new trade license and commercial registration. rn3) TIN number rn4) VAT certificate rn5) House rent or proof of ownership rn6) Agreement & E-CAF form rn7) License from Ministry of Transport (for speed limit service) rn8) License from Addis Traffic Management (for Motorbike service) rn9) Renewed or new VAS (Value Added Service) license given by ECA(Ethiopia communication autority) located on bole medahniyalem, robel plaza, if the solution is available for third party

services.name: VISP (Virtual internet service provider)
services.description: VISPrnvirtual internet service provider(VISP) is a company that offers internet services under its own company or brand name, while actually using the equipment and facilities of another ISP to provide those servicesrnrnEthio telecom will sell internet service to visps at a whole sale level and they will retail for final users with or without additional values. rnLegal Requirements to get VISP rn1) Request letter rn2) Renewed or new trade license and commercial registration. rn3) TIN number rn4) VAT certificate rn5) House rent or proof of ownership rn6)Renewed or new VAS (Value Added Service) license given by ECA(Ethiopia communication autority) located on bole medahniyalem, robel plaza. rn7) Well-developed Proposal

faqs.question: What is VAS
faqs.answer: Vale added service (VAS) is a term used in telecommunications to describe non-core features. They are generally marketed as premium features and add-ons to basic core functions.!

faqs.question: What is Short Code
faqs.answer: Short Codes are numbers shorter than full numbers which can be used to address mobile SMS, USSD, APP, WEB and MMS messages and Voice Services from mobile phones or fixed lines.

faqs.question: What is USSD
faqs.answer: Unstructured Supplementary Service Data (USSD) sometimes referred to as "Quick Codes" or "Feature codes", is a protocol used by GSM cellular telephones to communicate with the service provider's computers.

faqs.question: What is CRBT
faqs.answer: A Color Ring-back Tone (CRBT) is the audible ringing that is heard on the telephone line by the calling party after dialing and prior to the call being answered at the receiving end.

faqs.question: MO (Mobile Originated)
faqs.answer: MO (Mobile Originated): A mobile message routed from an end user's mobile device and delivered to a mobile phone or an application. The end user is billed by the network when they send in their initial message. The sender will be charged.

faqs.question: MT (Mobile terminated)
faqs.answer: MT (Mobile terminated): refers to a message that goes out from a system and is received by the subscriber's mobile device and the receiver will be charged.

faqs.question: Partner
faqs.answer: Partner is Business Company which has a VAS license and got an agreement with ethio telecom.

faqs.question: What is Bulk SMS
faqs.answer: Bulk SMS refers specifically to the sending of large number of SMS messages to the mobile phones of a predetermined group of recipients.

faqs.question: Content Provider
faqs.answer: Content Provider: A person or a business that provides content. Content means any sound, text, picture, moving picture or other audio-visual representation, tactile representation or any combination of the preceding which is capable of being created, manipulated, stored, retrieved or communicated electronically.

faqs.question: How many short code is required for MT service
faqs.answer: Two short code is required for MT service

faqs.question: How many short code is required for MO service
faqs.answer: One short code is required for MO service

faqs.question: White list
faqs.answer: White list: customers who do want to get any commercial advertising message by sending consent to a short code from ethio telecom and/or partners.

faqs.question: Black list
faqs.answer: Black list: customers who do not want to get any commercial advertising message from ethio telecom and/or any third party.

faqs.question: What is API
faqs.answer: API Means application programing interface which enables the integration of the partners application with Ethio telecom for digital content sales.

faqs.question: What is Digital Content
faqs.answer: Digital content “refers to Album, Movie series, music, games, audio, video, image, books, text, picture or mobile applications provided for sales over the partners technology platform.

faqs.question: What is collocation
faqs.answer: Colocation service”: is a kind of hosting service that enables the partner to host its infrastructure in a well secured datacenters equipped with commercial power, generator backup power, and full UPS protected & filtered power with enterprise grade networking, cooling and fire suppression system facilities.

faqs.question: Facility” or “Data Centre
faqs.answer: Facility” or “Data Centre shall mean the ethio’s physical location or data centre in which Equipment storage space will be made available to Customer for installation and use of Equipment.

faqs.question: SDP
faqs.answer: SDP refers to the platform that allows both parties to access data and enables ethio telecom to control and provide services.

faqs.question: What is Space
faqs.answer: Space shall mean the Equipment storage space (“Space”) in which storage devices such as racks, cabinets, and cages shall reside, and which will be made available to Customer.

faqs.question: What is VISP
faqs.answer: Virtual Internet Service Provider (vISP): means a service provider of Virtual Internet Service that offers Internet services under its own company or brand name, while actually using the equipment and facilities of another internet service provider to provide those services.
